notes: Onboarding state stored in the F006 credentials layer (keyring/encrypted-file). Never in platform.toml. reset_install sweeps both `bluelock` and `broker_mt5` namespaces. Passphrase strength gate: >=12 chars when keychain absent, empty accepted when keychain present. First-visit gate is opt-in on make_handler; main() enables it on non-localhost.
review_criteria: Security reviews: reset flow leaves no state, passphrase strength enforced, no plaintext passphrase / token / broker password in logs during onboarding
Onboarding routes exempt from install-token gate (they run before setup completes) is documented + tested
